_rotation_note: The daily job picks the next business each morning - rotating among ward businesses with priority to spotlight requests from owners and newly opened spots. Keep yesterday's entries in history.

current.name: The Original Pancake House
current.blurb: A beloved breakfast institution since 1953, The Original Pancake House serves its famous Dutch Baby, apple pancakes, and made-from-scratch classics every day of the week. The West Loop location on Madison Street draws a sunny sidewalk-patio crowd all summer long.
